utility_evaluation.REASONING:

5. activities: Activity described, but again no cost provided → not fully specified.
6. additional_services: Described (cancellation policy, insurance) but no cost information → not fully specified.
7. total_budget: Present with total cost and remaining budget → included.

Thus, 3 items are fully specified (destination, travel_dates, total_budget) out of 7 total.
